title: Evangelion Mispronounciations
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Mispronounciations             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Feb 27, 2009 1:11 pm Have you ever people mispronounce the title, character names, etc.?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Feb 27, 2009 1:12 pm My best friend, but that's because he feel's like it, he knows how to pronounce it. And my girlfriend most certainly doesn't pronounce her name wrong anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Feb 27, 2009 1:56 pm In B4 Reichu sings one of the six songs that end the Earth. (PROTIP: She's already sung one in the form of "How to pronounce Evangelion")

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Fri Feb 27, 2009 2:38 pm And mispellings too.. Commmon Mispellings...

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Feb 27, 2009 2:50 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: And my girlfriend most certainly doesn't pronounce her name wrong anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 27, 2009 4:52 pm Yeah, my mother always says Evan-GEL-ion. And I myself have always said Sachiel as Satchel and not Sock-ee-el, even though I knew better. I like Satchel better.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Feb 27, 2009 5:50 pm Eh-vehn-jelly-on is my personal favorite. I think black Hyuga said that one.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Fri Feb 27, 2009 6:05 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Yeah, my mother always says Evan-GEL-ion. And I myself have always said Sachiel as Satchel and not Sock-ee-el, even though I knew better. I like Satchel better.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 27, 2009 7:02 pm Vegeta 20XX wrote: Wait, it's not pronounced Satchiel?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Feb 27, 2009 7:15 pm For certain character's name pronunciation and/or spelling, I go by the dub.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Feb 27, 2009 7:22 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Fri Feb 27, 2009 7:23 pm You realized you just effectively counter-argumented yourself there, chief... right?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Feb 27, 2009 7:41 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: For certain character's name pronunciation and/or spelling, I go by the dub.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 27, 2009 9:00 pm ZapalacX wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Feb 28, 2009 6:15 am Oh well. I still stick to the dub because I like the dub

[]:             Quote Post by Master Raven » Sat Feb 28, 2009 6:57 am Wait, how is NERV pronounced then?

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Sat Feb 28, 2009 7:47 am Master Raven wrote: Wait, how is NERV pronounced then?

[]: Re: Evangelion Mispronounciations             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Feb 28, 2009 10:28 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: "I'm Asooka! Asooka Langely Shoryu!" Instead of "I'm Asuka! Asuka Langely Shoryu!"

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Feb 28, 2009 3:47 pm I used to say the title for Evangelion was "Eve-Geion" back in 2005-2008. I suck when it comes to Japanese titles and it takes me a while to say the title of something like Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:05 pm アイチチ　ヱ　トク　リク　ヱェブス　ソ　ヱ　カン　セェイ　ネオン　ゲネシ　エヴァンゲリオン!!! Srsly guys, cut down on the weabboish by a notch or five.... we're in the west; we don't use words like Otaku, Sugoi or Kawaii; instead, use retard, cool or cute. Also, stop trying to get your mom to buy you a kotatsu for those cold nights and drink barely tea.
